articles.description: Bryon Noem, husband of Kristi Noem, enrolled in a 40-day Christian rehabilitation program for 'sexual behaviour' but did not complete it. Allegations surfaced about his fetish and cross-dressing, with claims of inappropriate messages exchanged with women.

articles.title: Woman sues OpenAI, says ChatGPT fuelled ex-boyfriend’s stalking behaviour after breakup
articles.description: A US lawsuit alleges that ChatGPT reinforced a man’s paranoia and harassment of his ex-partner—raising fresh concerns about AI safety, accountability, and mental health risks.

topStories.description: The deployment follows recent Iranian strikes on the Gulf nation, which damaged essential energy infrastructure and resulted in a Saudi casualty

topStories.title: Congress veteran Dhanushkodi Athithan calls for making the party a people’s movement
topStories.description: Dhanuskodi Athithan, a long-standing Congress leader and former Union Minister of State for Youth Affairs and Sport, wants the party to do field work and take up people’s issues. “Look at Tirunelveli and Kanniyakumari districts where the party is still strong. This is because of this approach,” he points out

topStories.title: A debate on the tenure of Election Commission-appointed police chief in Tamil Nadu
topStories.description: However, the EC order did not specify a tenure for him. The question is whether Mr. Rathore would be entitled to a minimum two-year tenure, as mandated by the Supreme Court in the  landmark Prakash Singh case. However, this ruling applies only to appointments made through the UPSC-led process

topStories.title: Russia-Ukraine Orthodox Easter ceasefire begins
topStories.description: Both sides have agreed to observe the temporary truce, as US-led diplomatic efforts to end the war continue to stall.

topStories.description: State can’t differentiate between serving employees and pensioners on DA: SC

topStories.description: The US State Department has taken action against Seyed Eissa Hashemi, son of 1979 Iran hostage crisis spokesperson Masoumeh Ebtekar, and his family, who are set to be deported. Rubio stated ‘anti-American terrorists or their families’ should not reside in the US.

dailyNews.title: Shashi Tharoor takes a dig at Pakistan over Shehbaz Sharif's post amid US-Iran talks, says ‘I do feel Washington gave…’
dailyNews.description: Congress MP Shashi Tharoor slammed Pakistan's PM Shehbaz Sharif for a social media post requesting a two-week extension for diplomacy in the West Asia conflict. The post's edit history revealed it was initially labeled as a draft, suggesting US involvement, according to Tharoor.

dailyNews.title: US Rep. Eric Swalwell, candidate for California governor, rejects rape and sexual assault allegations: What did he say?
dailyNews.description: US Representative Eric Swalwell has been accused of rape and sexual assault by a former staffer, which he denied. Additionally, three other women have accused him of sexual misconduct, including sending unsolicited explicit messages, allegations he also rejected.

topStories.title: US and Iranian Negotiators Arrive in Pakistan for Peace Talks
topStories.description: Vice President JD Vance has arrived in Pakistan for high-stakes peace talks between the United States and Iran. The Iranians demands include the lifting of sanctions while the Trump administration is looking for multiple concessions, including the release of American detainees. NBC’s Keir Simmons reports for Saturday TODAY from Islamabad.

topStories.title: Inside Kristen Welker's interview with the Cuban president
topStories.description: In his first interview with a U.S. broadcast network, Cuban President Miguel Díaz-Canel insisted to @MeetThePress moderator Kristen Welker that he's not "stepping down," despite the Trump administration's increasing pressure on Cuba. Kristen joins "Here's the Scoop" to discuss what was happening behind the scenes during her interview.

dailyNews.title: WATCH:  Trump says Iran doing 'very poor job' of allowing oil through Strait of Hormuz
dailyNews.description: President Trump accused Iran of violating its agreement with the U.S. over the Strait of Hormuz, saying on Thursday that it was "doing a poor job" of allowing oil to pass through the waterway.

dailyNews.title: WATCH:  Young men in U.S. to be automatically registered into military draft
dailyNews.description: The U.S. plans to roll out a system by December that automatically registers young men for the military draft, a policy signed into law by President Trump last year.

dailyNews.title: WATCH:  Melania Trump declares ‘I am not Epstein’s victim’
dailyNews.description: Melania Trump forcefully denied she had any relationship with Jeffrey Epstein, saying in a White House speech, she is speaking out to defend herself against people who are smearing her "good name."

dailyNews.title: Trump praises Palantir as stock has worst week in over a year and Iran conflict drags on
dailyNews.description: Palantir's Maven platform have reportedly been used in the U.S. military campaign in Iran.
